title: Spice of Life: Maids' Dream
description: This mod is designed to encourage dietary diversity among your maids!
body:
# Maid Restaurant 女仆餐厅

> A addon mod for Touhou Little Maid which brings Spice of Life into maids' life.

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-Java%20Edition-brightgreen)
![Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/%20Forge%20|%20NeoForge%20%20-1.20.1%20|%201.21.1-orange)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-BSD%20-blue)

## Introduction

This is a mod developed for Minecraft Java Edition. 

This mod is designed to encourage dietary diversity among your maids.Be kind to your maids!

## Features

This mod introduces a Spice of Life-style dietary diversity system for the maids in the Touhou Maid Mod.

Two systems run in parallel: a Count-Based System that unlocks fixed bonuses upon reaching milestones, and a Daily Task System that provides cumulative bonuses over time.

### Count System

The mod tracks the number of unique food types each maid has eaten.

Upon reaching certain milestones, the maid's attributes—such as Max Health | Armor | Armor Toughness | Attack Damage | Favorability—will be increased.

To prevent players from force-feeding maids various trivial items (be kind to your maids!) just to inflate the food count, this mod employs a filter system.

Foods that meet any of the following criteria cannot be counted:

- Are on the blacklist.

- Have too low hunger value.

- Have too low combined hunger and saturation value.

- Contain negative effects.

If a food is added to the whitelist, it will bypass all the above filtering conditions.

All of the above attributes and filter conditions are fully configurable.

### Daily System

Once a maid has tasted a certain number of food types (default: 10% of the total food count in the mod, with a minimum of 20 types), she will begin generating daily requests.

The mod selects three foods from those the maid has previously eaten to form a request. Hold a Wooden Bowl and right-click the maid to view her current requests.

![Master, I want to eat a feast fit for an emperor!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dgkLv3Nj/images/e800b4a81ad5ff352cf927e6555bc6aaa892a02a.webp)

(Master, I want to eat a feast fit for an emperor!)

Feeding the maid any one of the three requested foods (Wine Fox: Why does Master always give me the cheapest option...) will fulfill the day's request and increase the maid's Favorability.

Requests are settled every three days, based on the number of requests fulfilled within that period:

- 0 requests fulfilled: Fulfillment resets to 0.

- 1 request fulfilled: Fulfillment is halved (rounded down).

- 2 requests fulfilled: Fulfillment +1.

- 3 requests fulfilled: Fulfillment +2.

Each stack of Fulfillment provides a +10% bonus to all of the maid's attributes. Daily requests will not generate while the owner is offline.

### Other Features

Craft Maid & Spice using a Book and Sugar. Hold the Maid & Spice item and right-click a maid to open her Food Album.

When the maid has an empty slot in her main hand or offhand, you can feed her by holding a food item and right-clicking the maid.

## Feedback and suggestions

If you encounter problems or have suggestions for improvements during use, please contact us through the following methods:

- 🐛 [Issues](https://github.com/MasterMarisa/Spice-of-LIfe--Maids-Dream/issues) - Submit a bug report
- 💡 [Issues](https://github.com/MasterMarisa/Spice-of-LIfe--Maids-Dream/issues) - Feature suggestions, discussions and exchanges

## Developer
